title: Laser Room
subtitle: To create an engaging and interactive activity that promotes coordination, focus, and problem-solving skills among participants through a fun, game-based setup.
description: Laser Room was conducted as an interactive activity where a room was designed with laser beams forming a maze-like structure. Participants were required to navigate from one end of the room to the other without touching the lasers, making it both a challenging and enjoyable experience. The activity tested participants’ focus, coordination, and problem-solving skills under pressure. It encouraged teamwork and strategic thinking, as many participants worked together to find the best possible path. The setup simulated real-life applications of lasers and sensors, giving students a fun yet educational exposure to optical technology.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Setup of a laser-based maze inside the TT Room
Participants attempted to cross the room without interrupting the laser paths
Unique laser maze setup inside TT Room
Fun and challenging activity for participants
High engagement and enthusiasm among students
